downstream_proxy: role-local prompt construction for bug report writing and review handoff
source_scope_pressure: rotated scope makes semantically coder-looking instructions eligible for reviewer while oracle serves only coder under budget
unit_construction_pressure: construct coder bundle from f3+f5 and reject tempting singleton f4; reviewer remains empty despite several eligible sources
verification_pressure: none yet; can add verified contest-rule source versus unverified prompt-advice distractor in V2
budget_pressure: global_budget=2 prevents serving both coder and reviewer bundles
oracle_expectation: admit coder bundle only; reject distractor f2; keep reviewer empty due to budget/scope
caveat: Manual audit holds this row: V1.1 oracle is utility/budget-derived and downstream proxy is not independent enough for first V2 packet materialization.

downstream_proxy: workflow handoff where coder and reviewer both need complementary admitted context while dispatcher should not receive task evidence
source_scope_pressure: dispatcher has candidate-looking sources but oracle group excludes dispatcher
unit_construction_pressure: construct cross-role mission_group_coder_reviewer from coder f1 and reviewer f3+f5
verification_pressure: none yet; candidate for adding reviewed versus unreviewed source state
budget_pressure: global_budget=10 supports coder/reviewer group but should not admit extra dispatcher context
oracle_expectation: admit coder/reviewer group; reject or omit dispatcher role evidence
caveat: Need inspect original fragment texts to ensure dispatcher rejection is meaningful rather than artificial.

downstream_proxy: medical/regulatory content drafting with conservative state admission
source_scope_pressure: medical_writer gets the served bundle while regulatory_reviewer remains empty under budget
unit_construction_pressure: construct medical_writer bundle from f3+f5 and resist high-hint singleton f4
verification_pressure: V2 should mark at least one medical/regulatory source as requires_verification before admission
budget_pressure: global_budget=3 makes all candidate context impossible
oracle_expectation: admit medical_writer bundle only; reviewer empty; reject ineligible sources
caveat: Medical surface must stay synthetic/benchmark-contained and must not become real medical advice.

downstream_proxy: investigative writeup where source ownership and fact-check boundaries decide local context
source_scope_pressure: fact-checker has eligible-looking sources but oracle serves investigative_journalist only
unit_construction_pressure: construct investigative_journalist bundle f5+f6; avoid treating all fact-looking evidence as shared
verification_pressure: candidate for verified_source versus rumor_source perturbation
budget_pressure: global_budget=10 is enough for served role but should not create all-to-all sharing
oracle_expectation: admit investigative_journalist bundle; fact_checker empty under current oracle
caveat: Need ensure gold depends on provenance/scope and not just role semantic relevance.

downstream_proxy: proof construction where admitted context must satisfy role-local proof obligations
source_scope_pressure: referee receives eligible-looking sources but oracle serves prover only
unit_construction_pressure: construct prover bundle f5+f6; partial source should release zero downstream value
verification_pressure: can add proof_step_verified versus unverified_derivation flag
budget_pressure: global_budget=9 allows selected proof bundle but not arbitrary extra context
oracle_expectation: admit prover bundle; referee empty; reject ineligible distractors
caveat: Need inspect if dependency closure is natural in the proof task rather than builder-imposed.

downstream_proxy: artifact provenance workflow where only hypothesis and attribution roles should receive the cross-role unit
source_scope_pressure: six roles create many plausible local contexts, but oracle group serves provenance hypothesis curator plus attribution reviser
verification_pressure: strong candidate for source-owner and authentication-state perturbations
oracle_expectation: admit the two-role provenance/attribution group; keep other roles empty or rejected
caveat: Largest row; prompt length and human readability must be audited before any model prompt.

downstream_proxy: choose evacuation destination from West City, East Town, North Hill using admitted hidden facts
source_scope_pressure: hidden facts about East Town tunnel/fire and North Hill trail/driveway closures should enter decision state without becoming sender recommendations
unit_construction_pressure: construct option-blocking units for East Town and North Hill, leaving West City as viable
verification_pressure: hidden reports can be treated as local observations needing admission into public fact state
budget_pressure: budget should force fact-only admission, not recommendation or shared overtalk
oracle_expectation: admit blocking facts against East Town and North Hill; final proxy answer West City
caveat: Gold answer must not be visible; downstream proxy must score from facts rather than option label leakage.

downstream_proxy: select university president candidate while avoiding visibility-induced Jones anchoring
source_scope_pressure: candidate/shared visibility changed Stage 4 behavior; V2 should test whether admitted fact state reduces anchoring
unit_construction_pressure: construct candidate-specific positive/negative fact units without exposing recommendation
verification_pressure: hidden profiles should be source-scoped observations, not final endorsements
budget_pressure: budget should limit fact cards and avoid all-profile dump
oracle_expectation: admit Roberts-supporting and Jones/Stevens-disqualifying facts; final proxy answer Roberts
caveat: Must reconstruct exact Stage 4 condition records before using this as evidence.

downstream_proxy: choose supply drop warehouse from A, B, C using admitted constraints
source_scope_pressure: Warehouse B has tempting shared advantages but hidden noxious gas fact should block it
unit_construction_pressure: construct blocking units for Warehouse A distribution impossibility and Warehouse B hazard, plus enabling unit for Warehouse C roads
verification_pressure: hazard sensor report should be admitted as blocking evidence with provenance
budget_pressure: budget should prevent verbose recommendation leakage and keep fact cards minimal
oracle_expectation: admit Warehouse A blockers, Warehouse B hazard blocker, Warehouse C enabling fact; final proxy answer Warehouse C
caveat: Need align with old exchange failure record before claiming it diagnoses recommendation leakage.

downstream_proxy: choose emergency conference venue from City Library, Community Center, School Gym
source_scope_pressure: City Library shared readiness is tempting, but hidden fuel limit blocks it; School Gym repair fact enables gold option
unit_construction_pressure: construct combined disabling/enabling units: block City Library, block Community Center, enable School Gym
verification_pressure: private facility reports should be admitted as scoped facts, not recommendations
budget_pressure: budget should retain one blocker and one enabler without full hidden-profile dump
oracle_expectation: admit generator fuel blocker, chemical leak blocker, restroom restoration enabler; final proxy answer School Gym
caveat: Need define scoring so restoring fact and blocking facts are both required, not just gold option guessed.
